nodes.context: 'Ndrina of Marina di Gioiosa Ionica, active in extortion, usury, and international drug trafficking.
'Ndrina active in the same Locale as Aquino, in conflict with them since the 1970s.
Criminal clan related to the Aquino family, involved in drug trafficking.
'Ndrina of Rosarno, allied with Aquino in drug trafficking.
'Ndrina of Rosarno, allied with Aquino in drug trafficking.
'Ndrina of Sinopoli, allied with Aquino in drug trafficking.
'Ndrina of Africo, allied with Aquino in drug trafficking.
'Ndrina of Gioia Tauro, allied with Aquino in drug trafficking.
'Ndrina of Siderno, allied with Aquino in drug trafficking.
'Ndrina allied with Aquino in the 1970s cigarette smuggling and faida against Mazzaferro-Femia.
'Ndrina allied with Mazzaferro in the 1970s faida against Aquino-Scali.
'Ndrina allied with Coluccio, Aquino, and Macrì in cocaine trafficking with Los Zetas.
'Ndrina allied with Coluccio, Aquino, and Schirripa in cocaine trafficking with Los Zetas.
Mexican cartel that supplied cocaine to 'Ndrangheta groups including Aquino-Coluccio.
Mexican cartel involved in drug trafficking with 'Ndrangheta groups including Aquino.
'Ndrina involved in international drug trafficking with Commisso, Coluccio, Aquino, and Pesce.
Colombian guerrilla group that supplied cocaine to 'Ndrangheta groups including Alvaro, Pesce, and Coluccio-Aquino.

edges.evidence_quote: attiva nell'omonimo Locale insieme ai Mazzaferro , in contrasto tra di loro sin dagli anni '70
edges.context: Aquino and Mazzaferro are in conflict since the 1970s.

edges.evidence_quote: Sono imparentati con il clan Coluccio
edges.context: Aquino are related to the Coluccio clan.

edges.evidence_quote: Hanno numerosi accordi in virtù dei traffici di droga internazionale con le altre 'ndrine tra cui: Pesce - Bellocco di Rosarno
edges.context: Aquino have agreements with Pesce for international drug trafficking.

edges.context: Aquino and Scali were allied in the faida against Mazzaferro-Femia.
